gotchas_discovered.issue: Documentation gaps analysis extremely comprehensive but not yet prioritized
gotchas_discovered.description: doc-001 through doc-012 enumerate 12 documentation improvements (estimated 28 days of work) but roadmap execution order not visible in current files
gotchas_discovered.context: ideation.json contains proposal details but no execution sequencing relative to code implementation specs (017-021)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure roadmap.json includes prioritization between ideation categories and spec ordering

gotchas_discovered.issue: Spec 017 (quicklook-zellij-links) shows 6 sessions but no clear success/failure disposition
gotchas_discovered.description: session_insights populated through session_007.json but final state unclear - is spec 017 complete or in-progress?
gotchas_discovered.context: review_state.json exists but content not shown in diff; build-progress.txt tracked
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify review_state.json and build-progress.txt disposition before advancing to wave execution

gotchas_discovered.issue: Auto-Claude codex mode hardcodes `/opt/homebrew/bin/nu` for dispatch
gotchas_discovered.description: dispatch.nu and system memory reference full path to nu binary; PATH pollution in Zellij panes noted in codex lessons
gotchas_discovered.context: Memory notes: 'use `/opt/homebrew/bin/nu` (full path) for mark-done/failed in Zellij panes — `nu` is not in PATH in `??` (detached) pane context'
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: All dispatch.nu pane commands must use `/opt/homebrew/bin/nu` explicitly; validate PATH in test environments

gotchas_discovered.issue: Stale CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR patterns may recur in new specs
gotchas_discovered.description: System memory documents 2026-03-01 fix for compile-time path baking; new specs (018-021) may reintroduce similar patterns
gotchas_discovered.context: Nushell migration (2026-03-03) completed but Rust binary changes in specs 017-021 not yet reviewed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Code review checklist must include 'no compile-time env! path usage' for all new Rust specs

gotchas_discovered.issue: Session insights populated but no cross-session pattern analysis visible
gotchas_discovered.description: 6 session_insights files exist (002-007) but no roll-up summary or failure mode categorization
gotchas_discovered.context: Attempt_history.json likely contains failure reasons but not surfaced
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Generate session_summary.json roll-up at wave completion analyzing failure modes and success factors

approach_outcome.summary: Full rebuild of Rust dispatcher and Swift Quick Look extension completed with structured Auto-Claude framework

Regenerated roadmap with competitor analysis and discovery artifacts
Spec 017 memory system with 6 session insights and attempt tracking
key_accomplishments: Established systematic ideation framework covering code, documentation, performance, security, UI/UX
Documented 12 critical documentation gaps with effort estimates and target audience
Generated 4 downstream specs for upcoming waves (CLI UX, serve security, event-driven dispatcher, onboarding)

recommendations.recommendation: Verify spec 017 completion state before wave execution
recommendations.rationale: 6 sessions of iteration tracked but final disposition unclear; review_state.json must confirm 'ready-for-merge' or block wave advancement

recommendations.recommendation: Add pre-spec-creation linter for Rust anti-patterns
recommendations.rationale: Stale CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR pattern (2026-03-01) fixed once; new specs likely to reintroduce similar compile-time path assumptions

recommendations.recommendation: Cross-map ideation priorities against spec wave ordering
recommendations.rationale: Documentation gaps (doc-001 through doc-012) enumerate 28 person-days of work but spec 017-021 focused on code features; no clear coordination between strategic documentation and implementation waves

recommendations.recommendation: Generate session_summary.json roll-up at wave completion
recommendations.rationale: 6 session_insights files exist for spec 017 but no categorization of failure modes, success factors, or learning application to subsequent specs

recommendations.recommendation: Hardcode `/opt/homebrew/bin/nu` path checks into dispatch.nu pane tests
recommendations.rationale: System memory documents PATH pollution in detached Zellij panes; validate this pattern in CI for all wave executions

recommendations.recommendation: Prioritize doc-001 (troubleshooting guide) in next wave
recommendations.rationale: System memory notes common failure patterns (stale locks, orphaned cards, adapter timeouts); troubleshooting guide directly addresses operational pain points

recommendations.recommendation: Track CPU/load during spec execution to detect runaway efi test binaries
recommendations.rationale: System memory notes syspolicyd and dub_debug binaries cause 600%+ CPU, hanging all bop binaries; monitor load during wave execution and kill stale processes
